design_philosophy: Objective, highly legible, functional-first SaaS. For medical students where information density and clarity are critical. The UI serves as a neutral, high-contrast canvas so that the colorful subject tags and learning content stand out without visual clutter. Surfaces are flat and solid—no glassmorphism, as it distorts reading.

spacing_and_layout.general: Generous internal padding (p-6 or p-8) for cards to prevent text collision. The dashboard must use a 'Control Room' dense grid.
spacing_and_layout.dashboard_grid: grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-3 lg:grid-cols-4 gap-6. Use col-span-2 or col-span-3 for main activity charts. col-span-1 for stats summaries.
spacing_and_layout.card_style: bg-white border border-border rounded-xl shadow-sm hover:shadow-md transition-shadow duration-200. No heavy gradients.

buttons.primary: bg-primary text-primary-foreground hover:bg-primary/90 rounded-lg px-4 py-2 font-medium transition-colors
buttons.secondary: bg-secondary text-secondary-foreground hover:bg-secondary/80 rounded-lg px-4 py-2 font-medium transition-colors
buttons.accent: bg-accent text-accent-foreground hover:bg-accent/90 rounded-lg px-4 py-2 font-medium transition-colors shadow-sm
buttons.outline: border border-border text-primary hover:bg-muted rounded-lg px-4 py-2 font-medium transition-colors

inputs.default: border border-border rounded-lg px-4 py-2 focus:ring-2 focus:ring-accent focus:border-accent outline-none bg-white transition-all text-sm

subject_card.style: bg-white border-l-4 border-r border-t border-b border-border rounded-lg p-6 hover:-translate-y-1 transition-transform cursor-pointer shadow-sm
subject_card.note: The left border color should be dynamically set to the subject's customizable color.

flashcard.style: bg-white border border-border rounded-2xl p-12 text-center shadow-sm min-h-[300px] flex flex-col justify-center items-center cursor-pointer hover:shadow-md transition-all
flashcard.flip_animation: Use Framer Motion for a 3D flip effect on Y-axis.

sidebar.style: w-64 border-r border-border bg-white h-screen fixed top-0 left-0 flex flex-col
sidebar.link_active: bg-muted text-primary font-medium rounded-lg px-3 py-2 flex items-center gap-3
sidebar.link_inactive: text-muted-foreground hover:bg-muted/50 hover:text-primary rounded-lg px-3 py-2 flex items-center gap-3 transition-colors

knowledge_graph.style: Use a light canvas background. Nodes should be primary color, edges should be muted.
knowledge_graph.library: react-force-graph-2d or custom svg for simpler views.

motion.hover: Subtle -translate-y-[2px] and shadow elevation for cards.
motion.page_transition: Fade in with slight upward motion (y: 10 to 0) using Framer Motion.

auth_hero.description: Medical student studying at desk, used for login/signup page side panel.

empty_state_anatomy.description: Clean anatomy illustration, used as a subtle background or empty state graphic in the AI analysis section.

instructions_to_main_agent: Install and use 'lucide-react' for all icons.
Use 'recharts' for the statistics page (Radar chart for subject mastery, Line chart for activity).

Use Shadcn UI primitives for Tabs, Dialogs, Select, DropdownMenu, Progress, and Cards. Heavily customize them to remove default Vercel look by applying the 'Swiss & High-Contrast' borders and flat colors.
For the main layout, implement a fixed sidebar on desktop and a mobile-friendly hamburger menu.
Ensure all interactive elements have 'data-testid' attributes in kebab-case.
The Dashboard should utilize a strict bento grid ('Control Room' mode) to maximize data density.
For the course text view, provide a reading-focused typography setup: max-w-prose, leading-loose, text-base.
Use Framer Motion for the Flashcard flipping animation and staggered list rendering for subjects.
